<T>(route: string, payload: unknown, extraHeaders?: Record<string, string>): Promise<FetchResult<T>> {
    return this.performFetch<T>({
      endpoint: `${this.apiRoot}${route}`,
      verb: 'POST',
      payload,
      customHeaders: { ...this.baseHeaders, ...extraHeaders },
      timeoutMs: this.timeoutDuration,
      retryCount: this.retryLimit,
    })

<T>(path: string, body: unknown, headers?: Record<string, string>): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
    return this.executeRequest<T>({
      url: `${this.baseUrl}${path}`,
      method: 'POST',
      body,
      headers: { ...this.defaultHeaders, ...headers },
      timeout: this.requestTimeout,
      retries: this.maxRetries,
    })
